items.title: Jamal Shead wasn't going to be a "decline-and-resign" guy with his team option because of Toronto's position vis-a-vis the tax. Still possible they extend him off this number, but teams typically handle that business later in summer.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Jamal Shead wasn't going to be a "decline-and-resign" guy with his team option because of Toronto's position vis-a-vis the tax. Still possible they extend him off this number, but teams typically handle that business later in summer.

media.title: Predicting the NBA’s notable player options, team options and non-guarantees
media.description: Get accustomed to the phrase “decline and re-sign," because you’re going to be hearing it a lot as teams look to manage their salary caps.

items.title: Raptors exercise 2026-27 team option on Jamal Shead
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Raptors exercise 2026-27 team option on Jamal Shead HoopsHype

items.title: JUST IN: The Toronto Raptors have exercised the $2.30 million team option on Jamal Shead for the 2026-27 season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Shead played all 82 games, averaging 6.6 points and 5.4 assist per game for Toronto last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
